prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is M-302 Belts, sheaves & couplings within 2.7 Equipment & Machinery. The relevant subcategory is 2.7.3 Rotating Equipment. The observed field condition is: sheave misalignment (straightedge in photo). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors mfr guides. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 M-302 Measurement & estimation
